title: Jan Johnson
compiled_truth: Jan Johnson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-25 to 2001-11-18), Jan Johnson sent 4 and received 76 emails, totalling 80 interactions. Top correspondents: [Bob Butts](people/bob-butts) (4), [Terrie Wheeler](people/terrie-wheeler) (3), [Fernley Dyson](people/fernley-dyson) (3), [Kent Castleman](people/kent-castleman) (3), [Wes Colwell](people/wes-colwell) (3).
